enum_values.name: Exact
enum_values.summary: String must match the key exactly.

enum_values.name: Start
enum_values.summary: String must start with the key.

enum_values.name: WordExact
enum_values.summary: String must contain word that is an exact match with the key.

enum_values.name: WordStart
enum_values.summary: String must contain a word that starts with the key.

enum_values.name: Fuzzy
enum_values.summary: String must contain word that is somewhat similar to the key.

enum_values.name: AllClean
enum_values.summary: Represents all match types except fuzzy matching.
